goal: Stop counting packet/handoff/auth-blocked preparation work as live marketing execution and preserve real external submissions as the canonical executed action.

changes.summary: Prep-only lanes now log status=prepared, include live_external_action=false, and record GitHub auth blockers for PR-style lanes.
Audit now normalizes standalone live submission logs, prefers the most recent live external action, and distinguishes preparation work from true execution.
Certification now requires live_external_action instead of treating handoff packets as shipped system redesign.
Independent verification now requires live_external_action for shipped-system-redesign credit.
Watchdog now only treats non-Reddit live external actions as real outcome repair.
Added regression coverage for prepared-vs-live semantics, normalized live submission logs, and auth-blocked curator packet behavior.
